title: Glow
description: Replace the glowstone blobs on the Nether's ceiling with clusters of volatile glowstone crystals!
body:
![A Glowstone Prism cluster from below](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Y8eR2217/images/88ef44b2181fc1779ad1c0d69db83127b2588031.png) **Glow** removes the Nether's glowstone blobs in favour of groups of large glowstone crystals which light up the Nether ceiling pleasantly, and provide a new danger with falling stalks of glowstone which explode when they hit the ground. The glowstone prisms fall randomly at a slow pace, and the player can also use any projectile to destroy a prism and cause the blocks underneath it to fall.

A prism cluster at a faster random tick speed.
